name: INCYTE CORP
business: Incyte is a global biopharmaceutical company engaged in the discovery, development and commercialization of proprietary therapeutics in Hematology, Oncology, and Inflammation and Autoimmunity.

exposures.sentence: Incyte is a global biopharmaceutical company engaged in the discovery, development and commercialization of proprietary therapeutics.

catalysts.event: FDA approval of MONJUVI for follicular lymphoma
catalysts.sentence: In June 2025, MONJUVI (tafasitamab-cxix) was approved by the FDA for the treatment of adult patients with r/r follicular lymphoma (FL) in combination with rituximab and lenalidomide.

catalysts.event: European Commission approval of MINJUVI for follicular lymphoma
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, MINJUVI (tafasitamab) was approved by the European Commission in combination with lenalidomide and rituximab for the treatment of adult patients with r/r FL (Grade 1-3a) after at least one line of systemic therapy.

catalysts.event: Japan MHLW approval of MINJUVI for follicular lymphoma
catalysts.sentence: Also in December 2025, MINJUVI (tafasitamab) was approved by Japan's Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare (MHLW) in combination with rituximab and lenalidomide for adult patients with r/r FL (2L+ FL).

catalysts.event: FDA Breakthrough Therapy designation for INCA033989 in essential thrombocythemia
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we announced that the FDA granted Breakthrough Therapy designation to INCA033989 for the treatment of patients with ET harboring a Type 1 CALR mutation who are resistant or intolerant to at least one cytoreductive therapy.

catalysts.event: Positive topline results from Phase 3 frontMIND trial for tafasitamab in DLBCL
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we announced positive topline results from the pivotal Phase 3 frontMIND trial evaluating tafasitamab and lenalidomide in combination with R-CHOP as a first-line therapy for patients with DLBCL.

catalysts.event: Regulatory decision and commercial launch for ruxolitinib XR
catalysts.sentence: A response to the CRL has been submitted and we anticipate a regulatory decision and potential commercial launch in mid-2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 3 trial for INCA033989 in essential thrombocythemia
catalysts.sentence: The initiation of a Phase 3 trial evaluating INCA033989 in ET is anticipated in mid-2026.

catalysts.event: Phase 1 trial initiation for INCA033989 with Enable Injections delivery system
catalysts.sentence: A Phase 1 trial initiation is anticipated in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 3 trial for INCB161734 in first-line pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma
catalysts.sentence: A Phase 3 study evaluating INCB161734 in combination with standard-of-care chemotherapy in first-line patients with metastatic PDAC is anticipated to initiate in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: FDA acceptance of NDA for povorcitinib in hidradenitis suppurativa
catalysts.sentence: The acceptance by the FDA of our NDA submission for povorcitinib in HS is anticipated in the first quarter of 2026, with potential approval by early 2027.

catalysts.event: Data from Phase 3 studies of povorcitinib in vitiligo
catalysts.sentence: Data from the Phase 3 studies are anticipated by mid-2026.

catalysts.event: Regulatory decision for OPZELURA in moderate atopic dermatitis in Europe
catalysts.sentence: we anticipate a potential approval in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline results from Phase 3 studies of ruxolitinib cream in hidradenitis suppurativa
catalysts.sentence: topline results anticipated in the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Data from Phase 3 studies of povorcitinib in prurigo nodularis
catalysts.sentence: Data from the Phase 3 studies are anticipated in the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Proof-of-concept data for povorcitinib in asthma
catalysts.sentence: Proof-of-concept data from this study is anticipated in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Phase 1 data for INCB160058 in MPN
catalysts.sentence: Results from the Phase 1 trial evaluating INCB160058 in MPN patients with a JAK2V617F mutation are anticipated in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Phase 1 data for INCA035784 in MPN
catalysts.sentence: Phase 1 data evaluating INCA035784 in MF and ET patients with a CALR mutation are anticipated in 2027.

catalysts.event: Phase 2 results for axatilimab in newly diagnosed chronic GVHD
catalysts.sentence: A Phase 2 trial evaluating axatilimab in combination with ruxolitinib in patients with newly diagnosed chronic GVHD is ongoing, with results anticipated in early 2027.

catalysts.event: Phase 3 results for axatilimab in chronic GVHD
catalysts.sentence: A Phase 3 trial evaluating axatilimab in combination with corticosteroids as an initial treatment in patients with chronic GVHD is ongoing, with results anticipated in early 2028.
